escalation_reason: Customer was charged $2,400 for an annual plan they cancelled 3 months ago. Two previous support tickets (#41822, #41956) were closed without resolution. Customer has been waiting 18 days for a refund.

Ticket #41956 (Feb 03): Agent escalated internally but case stalled in billing queue.

escalation_history.notes: Reviewing billing history and previous tickets
